nasb.text: He captured Agag the king of the Amalekites alive, and utterly destroyed all the people with the edge of the sword.

esv.text: And he took Agag the king of the Amalekites alive and devoted to destruction all the people with the edge of the sword.

cnv.text: 生擒了亞瑪力人的王亞甲，用刀殺滅了所有人民。

ccb.text: 生擒了亚玛力王亚甲，杀尽了亚玛力人。
